rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope when bindings depend on subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture integrity by only referencing ports, components, and properties explicitly defined in the input model.
Place component-level contracts in type scopes; implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax.
Use only ports and variables exposed in the AADL model—never assume implicit property access.
anti_patterns: Do not inject references to AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not convert Boolean or opaque data ports into numeric range comparisons without explicit scalar typing.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
